---
title: "Contact"
---

The best way to reach me is by email. For collaboration, data-monitoring,
or expert-witness inquiries, feel free to include a brief description of
your project.

::: {.contact-grid}

::: {.contact-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> Email

**Academic**<br>
[berg@psu.edu](mailto:berg@psu.edu)

**Personal**<br>
[StatisticalBerg@gmail.com](mailto:StatisticalBerg@gmail.com)

**Music Ministry**<br>
[TrinityLemoyneMusic@gmail.com](mailto:TrinityLemoyneMusic@gmail.com)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-phone"></i> Phone

**Cell**<br>
[717-982-7828](tel:+17179827828)
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-building"></i> Mailing address

Arthur Berg, Ph.D.<br>
Department of Public Health Sciences, A210<br>
Penn State College of Medicine<br>
90 Hope Drive, Suite 2200<br>
Hershey, PA 17033-0855
:::

::: {.contact-card}
### <i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i> Online

- [<i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/arthurberg)
- [<i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/arthurberg)
- [<i class="ai ai-orcid"></i> ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4097-7348)
- [<i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=asQf9VQAAAAJ)
- [Penn State Pure profile](https://pennstate.pure.elsevier.com/en/persons/arthur-berg)
:::

:::
